jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Doubtnut
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
